nodes.name: New Application Webhook
nodes.notes: Triggered when a candidate submits a job application form. Receives: name, email, role, cv_text, linkedin_url

nodes.name: Validate Application
nodes.notes: Check that required fields (role, email, cv_text) are present

values.content: You are an expert technical recruiter. Evaluate the candidate CV against the job role and return a JSON object with: score (0-100), strengths (array of 3 key strengths), gaps (array of concerns), recommendation (SHORTLIST / REJECT / HOLD), summary (2 sentence summary). Return only valid JSON, no markdown.

nodes.name: AI CV Screener
nodes.notes: Uses GPT-4o to evaluate the CV against the role and return a structured score and recommendation

nodes.name: Parse AI Response
nodes.notes: Parses the AI JSON response and merges it with the original candidate data

nodes.name: Shortlist or Reject?
nodes.notes: Routes candidate to shortlist flow or rejection flow based on AI recommendation

nodes.name: Schedule Interview (Google Calendar)
nodes.notes: Automatically schedules a 1-hour interview slot 2 business days out and invites the candidate

parameters.subject: =Interview Invitation - {{ $json.candidate.role }} at YourCompany
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $json.candidate.name }},

Thank you for applying for the {{ $json.candidate.role }} position. We were impressed by your profile and would love to invite you for an interview.

Details:
Date: In 2 business days
Duration: 1 hour
Format: Video call (link will follow)

Please confirm your availability by replying to this email.

Best regards,
HR Team

nodes.name: Send Interview Invitation
nodes.notes: Sends a personalised HTML interview invitation to the shortlisted candidate

nodes.name: Save to AirTable (Shortlisted)
nodes.notes: Saves shortlisted candidate with AI score and evaluation details to Airtable CRM

nodes.name: Notify Hiring Team (Slack)
nodes.notes: Posts a rich Slack notification to the hiring team channel with the full AI evaluation

parameters.subject: =Your application for {{ $json.candidate.role }}
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $json.candidate.name }},

Thank you for your interest in the {{ $json.candidate.role }} position at YourCompany.

After carefully reviewing your application, we regret to inform you that we will not be moving forward with your candidacy at this time. This was a competitive process and we encourage you to apply for future openings.

We wish you all the best in your job search.

Kind regards,
HR Team

nodes.name: Send Rejection Email
nodes.notes: Sends a polite, personalised rejection email to candidates not shortlisted

nodes.name: Save to AirTable (Rejected)
nodes.notes: Saves rejected/hold candidates to Airtable for future reference and talent pool

parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "received", "message": "Your application has been received. You will hear from us shortly." }

nodes.name: Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Returns immediate acknowledgement to the candidate application form

meta.description: End-to-end AI-powered recruitment pipeline. Receives applications via webhook, screens CVs using GPT-4o, scores candidates, auto-schedules interviews for shortlisted candidates, sends personalised emails, notifies hiring team on Slack, and logs everything to Airtable.
meta.author: Ramalakshmi Mani
